name: Fire Bucket with Stand — Sand / Water Point
shortDescription: Red fire bucket on a stand — a standard first-response fire point fixture required at most factory premises.
longDescription: A simple, always-ready first line of defence: sand or water-filled buckets mounted on a stand at a designated fire point, required under most state factory rules alongside extinguishers at high-risk locations such as fuel stores, welding bays and boiler rooms. The mild steel bucket and stand are powder-coated fire red for instant recognition and finished to withstand daily outdoor exposure.

images.alt: Fire Bucket with Stand — Sand / Water Point supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Contents
specs.value: Dry sand or water, as specified

specs.label: Typical location
specs.value: Fuel stores, welding bays, boiler rooms
